expected_behaviors: Logs the three committed improvements as decisions
Decision 3: Design docs for items over 3 story points with lightweight template
Captures who proposed each item and the rationale
Distinguishes between discussion items (Start/Stop/Continue) and firm team commitments
anti_patterns: Logs every retro feedback item as a decision
Misses the conditional decision (design doc template from Olivia)
Confuses suggestions from Stop/Start with committed decisions
